cta.title: Have a mobile app idea that needs to ship?
cta.description: Tell me about your product and platform needs — I'll reply within one business day with next steps.

home.description: I'm Muhammad Awais, a mobile app developer with a strong foundation in native Android (Kotlin & Java), plus 2+ years building production apps with Kotlin Multiplatform, Compose Multiplatform, and Flutter.
home.processSubtitle: A process built around shipping, not meetings

01.title: Discovery
01.body: A focused call to define scope, platforms, and what 'done' looks like for launch.

02.title: Architecture
02.body: I design the module structure — Clean Architecture layers, shared vs. platform code — before writing UI.

03.title: Build
03.body: Weekly builds you can install and test on a real device, not just progress reports.

04.title: Ship
04.body: Store listing, release pipeline, and a handover doc your future team can actually use.

about.title: About
about.headerTitle: Hi, I'm Muhammad — a mobile app developer.
about.headerDesc: Mobile developer with 4+ years shipping production apps. Specialized in Android native, Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Compose Multiplatform (CMP), and Flutter. Building scalable, maintainable cross-platform systems with clean architecture.
about.expertiseSubtitle: What I bring to a mobile team

projects.title: Projects
projects.headerTitle: Shipped apps across Android Native and Kotlin Multiplatform.
projects.headerDesc: Filter by platform to see how the architecture and stack shift depending on what the product actually needs.

blog.title: Blog
blog.headerDesc: Practical writing on Android, Kotlin Multiplatform, and Compose Multiplatform — from real engagements, not theory.

contact.title: Contact
contact.headerTitle: Tell me about what you're building.
contact.headerDesc: Share a few details about the project and platforms in mind — I reply personally within one business day.
beforeWriteTips: A rough idea of scope helps more than a full spec.
Mention if you already know your target platforms.
Existing designs or a live app are useful, but not required.

form.detailsPlaceholder: What are you building, and what's the timeline?
form.detailsRequired: Tell me a bit more about the project (12+ characters).
form.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out — I read every message myself and reply within one business day. Check your inbox for a confirmation email.
form.preferDirect: Prefer email? Reach me directly and I'll reply from there too.

services.title: What I offer
services.headerTitle: Custom mobile engineering, built for scale.
services.headerDesc: Native Android and cross-platform development — sharing code where it helps, going fully native where it matters.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.headerTitle: What it's like to work together.
testimonials.headerDesc: Feedback from founders and product leads after shipping Android Native and Kotlin Multiplatform apps together.

notfound.title: This screen doesn't exist.
notfound.desc: The page you're looking for was moved, renamed, or never built. Let's get you back on track.
